creator: jpmasseo@cologuys.com
text:
fetchconfig 0.14 added support for Datacom DmSwitch, but the archive is missing DmSwitch.pm.

central# fetchconfig
Can't locate fetchconfig/model/DmSwitch.pm in @INC (@INC contains: /usr/local/bin/../lib /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8/BSDPAN /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8 .) at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/fetchconfig/model/Detector.pm line 33.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/fetchconfig/model/Detector.pm line 33.
Compilation failed in require at /usr/local/bin/fetchconfig line 28.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/bin/fetchconfig line 28.

Fix: 

Fix:
Manually download DmSwitch.pm from SAVANNAH CVS and place in the appropriate directory.

Workaround:
Comment out lines 33 and 193 in Detector.pm which reference DmSwitch.pm.
How-To-Repeat: install port, execute fetchconfig
